projectDescription: A web platform that generates adaptive AI-powered cinematographic analysis for movies, detecting whether they are mainstream entertainment or auteur cinema and delivering tailored structured analysis in Spanish.
keyFeatures: Adaptive AI analysis: automatically classifies films as mainstream entertainment or auteur/deep cinema
Two distinct analysis modes: Entertainment (epic moments, easter eggs, trivia) and Deep (symbolism, themes, director style, cultural context)
Google Gemini 1.5 Flash integration for AI-generated analysis in Spanish
TMDB API integration for movie metadata, genres, and keywords
Analysis caching: generated analyses are stored in MySQL to avoid redundant API calls
Personalized recommendations based on user genre preferences and cinephile level
User onboarding flow with cinephile level selection (Explorer, Enthusiast, Expert)
Favorites system and search history per user
Admin panel for movie catalog management and analysis regeneration
JWT-based authentication with role-based access control (guest, registered, admin)
publicApiSurface: POST /api/auth/login — Authenticate user and receive JWT
POST /api/analisis/generar — Generate AI analysis for a movie
GET /api/analisis/:peliculaId — Retrieve stored analysis for a movie
PUT /api/usuarios/perfil — Update user profile and genre preferences
POST /api/admin/peliculas — Add movie to catalog (admin only)
PUT /api/admin/analisis/:id/regenerar — Force regenerate AI analysis (admin only)
